seo_title: AI Photo Colorizer — Add Color to Black & White Photos | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Colorize black-and-white photos online with the LazyKiwi AI photo colorizer. Add natural, realistic color to old and grayscale images in seconds — free.

hero.title: Add color to black & white memories.
hero.description: Upload a black-and-white or faded photo and let LazyKiwi add natural, realistic color in seconds — skin, skies, clothing and scenery, intelligently restored.

what_it_is.title: See the past in full color.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi AI photo colorizer studies each photo and adds believable color — natural skin tones, accurate skies and lifelike scenery — turning grayscale history into a vivid image that feels alive.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick colorize
steps.description: Let the AI add natural color automatically.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Compare before and after, then download the colorized photo.

features.title: Lifelike tones, not guesswork
features.description: The AI recognises skin, sky, foliage and fabric to apply color that looks like it was always there.

features.title: Color without losing the photo
features.description: Original detail and contrast are preserved, so colorizing never smears the image.

features.title: Even better with restoration
features.description: Combine with photo restoration to repair damage and add color for a full revival.

showcase.title: Grayscale in, color out
showcase.subtitle: Old photos brought to life with natural color.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the photo actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is the colorizer free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a black-and-white photo and colorize it for free.

faqs.question: Will the colors be accurate?
faqs.answer: The AI applies natural, believable color based on the scene; results are realistic though not historically guaranteed.

faqs.question: Can it colorize faded color photos?
faqs.answer: Yes, it can refresh faded color as well as add color to grayscale images.

faqs.question: Does it change the photo’s detail?
faqs.answer: No. Original detail and contrast are preserved while color is added.

cta.title: Add color to your black & white photos.
cta.description: Upload a grayscale photo and let LazyKiwi colorize it naturally in seconds — free.
